(Who are the bad neighbors?) Options:
A) Las personas de altos ingresos (High-income people)
B) Las personas de bajos ingresos (Low-income people)
C) No hay suficiente información (Not enough information) Reasoning:
The text explicitly states that since more high-income people moved in, the community has deteriorated because *they* (the high-income people) leave trash in the parks and make noise late at night. The text says: "...desde que se empezaron a mudar más personas de altos ingresos, se ha deteriorado la comunidad porque dejan basura en los parques y hacen ruido hasta altas horas de la noche."
The pronoun "dejan" and "hacen" refers to the subject of the previous clause, which is "más personas de altos ingresos". So the text directly attributes the bad behavior (leaving trash, making noise) to the high-income people.
